data.headline: Total Net Leverage Ratio at 2.35x, well below 3.50x covenant threshold

sentences.text: The Total Net Leverage Ratio as reported is 2.35x.
The covenant threshold under Section 6.10 is 3.50x.
The ratio is calculated as 178.6 divided by 76.0, resulting in 2.35x.
No acquisition addbacks were applied, and the transaction rows are empty, so no causal analysis can be performed.
No breach is identified; the ratio is well within the covenant limit.
